options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: shuffle_chai_attacks
options.description: Shuffles Chai's attacks from the store into the multiworld.

options.name: shuffle_peppermint_attacks
options.description: Shuffles Peppermint's attacks from the store into the multiworld.

options.name: shuffle_macaron_attacks
options.description: Shuffles Macaron's attacks from the store into the multiworld.

options.name: shuffle_korsica_attacks
options.description: Shuffles Korsica's attacks from the store into the multiworld.

options.name: shuffle_special_attacks
options.description: Shuffles Chai's special attacks from the store into the multiworld.

options.name: shuffle_store_items
options.description: Shuffles the items from the store into the multiworld.

options.name: shuffle_chips
options.description: Shuffles the chips from the store into the multiworld.

options.name: allow_selling_in_store
options.description:
Choose if attacks and special attacks should be able to be sold after getting a location check from them.

If disabled, after purchasing something in the store that can be sold, its value will be set to 0.

Items and chips can't be sold.

options.name: shuffle_vlogs
options.description:
Shuffles the VLogs scattered around Vandelay campus into the multiworld.

VLogs in the SPECTRA Hub Room and Vandelay Gameworks areas are not randomized.

options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
